name: nav
description: Learning project for building a coding agent.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && pnpm --dir backend run typecheck
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm --dir backend run build && pnpm run main:build && pnpm run renderer:build && electron desktop/electron/out/main.cjs
scripts.electron:smoke: pnpm --dir backend run build && pnpm run main:build && pnpm run renderer:build && electron desktop/electron/out/main.cjs --smoke
scripts.check:electron: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --dir backend run build && pnpm run main:build && pnpm run renderer:build && node --test tests/*.test.cts
